channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance clashes with 'The View' hosts over Epstein files, says nothing is being withheld
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance debated the ABC talk show's panel on Tuesday regarding the release of Epstein-related documents.

item.title: J.D. Vance blames left-wing rhetoric for planned attacks on UFC event
item.description: Vice President J.D. Vance on Tuesday responded to reports that authorities thwarted planned attacks targeting a UFC cage-fighting event.

item.title: Trump's National Garden of American Heroes faces lawsuit
item.description: Several Washington preservation groups are suing the Trump administration over President Trump's National Garden of American Heroes project.

item.title: MLB threatens players for expressing Christian faith after claiming 'Baseball Is For Everyone'
item.description: Major League Baseball threatened to discipline several Christian players on the San Francisco Giants after they inscribed Bible verses on their gear.
